response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker, directly aligning with the core stack and responsibilities; his work on AI-agent infrastructure, cloud-native systems (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and testing frameworks like Vitest (via DIY tools) demonstrates strong relevance, though his lack of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin/Java usage is a minor gap.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling experience
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles
Limited evidence of direct collaboration with product/design teams
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
